name: Black Panther
description: Marvel's Black Panther — Wakanda, T'Challa, and the films

questions.q: What is the real name of the superhero Black Panther?

source.notes: King of Wakanda and head of the Panther tribe.

questions.q: What is the name of the fictional African nation that Black Panther rules?

source.notes: A fictional East African nation hiding its advanced technology from the world.

questions.q: What is the name of the rare, ultra-strong metal found only in Wakanda?

source.notes: Also the metal in Captain America's shield.

questions.q: Which actor played T'Challa in the 2018 film 'Black Panther'?

source.notes: Boseman died of cancer in August 2020 at age 43.

questions.q: What is the name of T'Challa's younger sister, Wakanda's tech genius?

source.notes: Runs the Wakandan Design Group and is a Black Panther herself in later films.

questions.q: In Wakandan myth, which panther deity is invoked by the Black Panther?

source.notes: Also known as Bastet; an ancient Egyptian feline deity referenced in the Marvel lore.

questions.q: What is the name of the villainous cousin who challenges T'Challa for the throne in the 2018 film?

source.notes: Full alias Erik 'Killmonger' Stevens; real name N'Jadaka.

questions.q: Which actor plays Erik Killmonger in the 2018 'Black Panther' film?

source.notes: Reunited with director Ryan Coogler after 'Fruitvale Station' and 'Creed'.

questions.q: Which actress plays Shuri, T'Challa's inventor sister?

source.notes: British actress; took up the Black Panther mantle in the 2022 sequel.

questions.q: Which veteran actress plays Queen Ramonda, T'Challa's mother?

source.notes: Earned an Oscar nomination for 'Wakanda Forever' (2022).

questions.q: Forest Whitaker plays Zuri, a spiritual adviser. What is the title of the character?

source.notes: Guardian of the heart-shaped herb and ceremonial priest.

questions.q: In the films, what gives Black Panther his enhanced strength and senses?

source.notes: The herb is mutated by vibranium from a meteor.

questions.q: What is the Wakandan rallying cry accompanied by a crossed-arms salute?

source.notes: Crossed-arms salute called the 'Wakandan salute'.

questions.q: In which U.S. city was Erik Killmonger raised?

source.notes: Oakland, California — mirroring director Ryan Coogler's own hometown.

questions.q: According to the film, where did Killmonger attend graduate school?

source.notes: Also served in the U.S. Navy SEALs and JSOC before returning to Wakanda.

questions.q: Martin Freeman plays Everett Ross, an agent of which U.S. agency?

source.notes: First appeared in Captain America: Civil War (2016).

questions.q: Which actor plays M'Baku, leader of the mountain-dwelling Jabari tribe?

source.notes: Duke reprised the role in the 2022 sequel.

questions.q: Who plays Nakia, T'Challa's love interest and a Wakandan war dog (spy)?

source.notes: Kenyan-Mexican actress who also voices Raksha in 'The Jungle Book'.

questions.q: Who directed the 2018 film 'Black Panther' (and its 2022 sequel)?

source.notes: Also directed 'Creed' (2015) and 'Fruitvale Station' (2013).

questions.q: The character Black Panther first appeared in the pages of which Marvel comic in 1966?

source.notes: Created by Stan Lee and Jack Kirby; published July 1966.

questions.q: How many Academy Awards did the 2018 film 'Black Panther' win — the first superhero film to be nominated for Best Picture?

source.notes: Won Best Costume Design (Ruth Carter), Best Production Design, and Best Original Score.

questions.q: Who composed the Grammy- and Oscar-winning score for 'Black Panther'?

source.notes: Swedish composer who has scored much of Ryan Coogler's work.
